raw_data.details: The “NIPUN Bharat Mission” is a scheme under the Samagra Shiksha Programme, implemented by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to ensure that all children aged 3 to 9 achieve foundational literacy and numeracy by creating an enabling learning environment across all schools in Uttarakhand.
raw_data.benefits: Under this mission, all children can get admission in Class 1 as per the admission norms of all schools in the state.
raw_data.eligibility: The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand. All children aged 3 to 9 years are eligible to benefit from the scheme to achieve foundational literacy and numeracy.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineThe main objective of the Nipun Bharat Mission is to create an enabling environment to ensure universal attainment of basic literacy and numeracy. Admissions can be obtained in Class 1 as per admission norms in all schools of the state.
raw_data.documents_required: Documents are required as per the guidelines of the respective schools.

To know more please visit Check EligibilityUttarakhandNIPUN Bharat Mission - UttarakhandBharat MissionChild EducationNIPUNSamagra ShikshaDetailsThe “NIPUN Bharat Mission” is a scheme under the Samagra Shiksha Programme, implemented by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to ensure that all children aged 3 to 9 achieve foundational literacy and numeracy by creating an enabling learning environment across all schools in Uttarakhand. BenefitsUnder this mission, all children can get admission in Class 1 as per the admission norms of all schools in the state. EligibilityThe beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand. All children aged 3 to 9 years are eligible to benefit from the scheme to achieve foundational literacy and numeracy. Application ProcessOfflineThe main objective of the Nipun Bharat Mission is to create an enabling environment to ensure universal attainment of basic literacy and numeracy. Admissions can be obtained in Class 1 as per admission norms in all schools of the state. Documents RequiredDocuments are required as per the guidelines of the respective schools. Frequently Asked QuestionsWhat is the main objective of the Mission? The main objective is to ensure that all children aged 3 to 9 achieve foundational literacy and numeracy through a supportive and effective learning environment. Who are the beneficiaries of the mission? All children in the age group of 3 to 9 years are the beneficiaries. Can children get admission in Class 1 under this mission? Yes, all eligible children can get admission in Class 1 as per the admission norms of all schools in the state. Is the mission applicable to all schools in Uttarakhand? Yes, the mission is implemented across all government and recognized schools in the state. Are there any specific documents required for admission? Documents are required as per the admission guidelines of the respective schools. Sources And References[Guidelines (Page No. 52)](https://uk.gov.in/department92/library_file/file-30-01-2025-04-25-16.pdf)OkWas this helpful?

faqs.question: What is the main objective of the Mission?
faqs.answer: The main objective is to ensure that all children aged 3 to 9 achieve foundational literacy and numeracy through a supportive and effective learning environment.

faqs.question: Who are the beneficiaries of the mission?
faqs.answer: All children in the age group of 3 to 9 years are the beneficiaries.

faqs.question: Can children get admission in Class 1 under this mission?
faqs.answer: Yes, all eligible children can get admission in Class 1 as per the admission norms of all schools in the state.

faqs.question: Is the mission applicable to all schools in Uttarakhand?
faqs.answer: Yes, the mission is implemented across all government and recognized schools in the state.

faqs.question: Are there any specific documents required for admission?
faqs.answer: Documents are required as per the admission guidelines of the respective schools.
